testcase.name: test_sync_order_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_offline_sync_iter106.py:66: in test_sync_order_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
